original_t2i_prompt: A whimsical 3D render of a small robot sitting on a bench in a park, autumn leaves on the ground, soft daylight, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the season to winter: replace autumn leaves with a light layer of snow while keeping the bench and park layout.
Put a knitted scarf around the robot’s neck, bright red.
Add gentle falling snowflakes in the foreground.
Add a faint wet sheen on the robot’s metal surfaces only where snowflakes would melt on contact, and make the red scarf fibers look slightly damp at the edges without changing the snowfall density.

original_t2i_prompt: A high-end fashion editorial photo: a model in a minimalist studio wearing a plain white dress, strong directional light, crisp shadows, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the plain white dress into a structured black dress with subtle pleats.
Add a wide-brim hat matching the black fabric tone.
Change the background from plain studio to a textured charcoal-gray wall.

Add a single silver brooch pinned to one pleat that catches the directional light and casts a tiny sharp shadow onto the pleated fabric, ensuring the brooch placement makes sense with the pleat structure.

original_t2i_prompt: A bright outdoor photo of a wooden picnic table in a garden with a vase of daisies and a glass of iced tea. Sunny midday, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the lighting to cloudy soft light while keeping the garden setting.
Replace the daisies with lavender stems in the vase.
Add a slice of lemon floating in the iced tea glass.

Add a faint rainbow-like caustic pattern on the table from the iced tea glass and lemon slice, consistent with cloudy soft light (subtle, not overly bright), without altering the lavender arrangement.

original_t2i_prompt: A detailed pen-and-ink architectural sketch of a small bridge over a canal, with buildings in the background. Crosshatching, monochrome, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Add a rowboat under the bridge using the same pen-and-ink style.
Add two street lamps on the bridge, one on each side.
Introduce a light wash of sepia tone over the entire sketch while preserving ink lines.

Make the street lamps appear lit by adding a soft sepia glow halo that subtly brightens nearby crosshatching on the bridge railing, while keeping the rowboat and buildings consistent with the toned ink style.

original_t2i_prompt: A clean studio photo of a pair of sneakers on a seamless background, soft shadow, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the sneakers color to matte navy with white soles.
Add a subtle sprinkle of sand around the shoes on the floor.
Change the background from plain white to a pale sky-blue gradient.
Add a faint footprint impression in the sand that matches the sneaker outsole tread pattern and direction, implying one step was taken without moving the sneakers themselves.

original_t2i_prompt: A realistic photo of a bowl of fresh fruit on a kitchen island: apples, bananas, grapes, bright daylight, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Replace the bananas with ripe peaches while keeping the bowl and composition.
Change the daylight to warm indoor evening light from overhead.
Add a linen napkin folded beside the bowl.

Add a subtle specular highlight on the grapes that matches the overhead evening light and make a faint peach fuzz texture visible on the peaches only where the highlight grazes them, without changing the napkin fold.

original_t2i_prompt: A wide-angle interior photo of a small bookstore: wooden shelves, a reading nook chair, and a front window. Neutral daylight, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the reading nook chair from fabric to a brown leather armchair with visible creases.
Add a floor lamp next to the chair with the lamp turned on warm.
Change the overall scene to rainy weather outside the front window (visible droplets).

Make the warm lamp create a cozy pool of light that reflects subtly on the leather creases and contrasts with the cool rainy window light, ensuring both light sources remain distinct and physically consistent.

original_t2i_prompt: A realistic portrait of a young adult wearing a plain gray sweater, seated by a window with soft daylight, neutral background, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the gray sweater to a cable-knit cream sweater with visible knit detail.
Add a ceramic mug held in both hands, steam rising.
Change the daylight to a cooler, cloudy light while keeping the same window position.
Add a faint reflection of the window on the mug’s glossy surface and make the steam subtly drift toward the cooler window side, consistent with the new cloudy lighting and without changing the pose.

original_t2i_prompt: A photorealistic scene of a small garden pond with lily pads and a stone edge, midday sun, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the time to early morning with soft mist above the pond.
Add a single koi fish visible beneath the water surface.
Add a wooden footbridge crossing one corner of the pond.

Create gentle concentric ripples that originate exactly where the koi fish is closest to the surface and make the ripples subtly distort the reflection of the wooden footbridge without removing the morning mist.

original_t2i_prompt: A clean 3D render of a simple living-room scene: a low sofa, a rug, and a coffee table, neutral colors, soft ambient light, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the rug to a bold geometric pattern in muted tones.
Add a stack of three books on the coffee table (blank covers).
Add a tall houseplant in the corner near the sofa.

Add a soft shadow of the houseplant leaves that falls across the geometric rug pattern and partially over the book stack, ensuring the shadow edges and direction match the ambient lighting and do not obscure the rug’s pattern unnaturally.

original_t2i_prompt: A realistic photo of a bowl of soup on a wooden table with a spoon, soft side light, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the soup to a tomato soup with a cream swirl on top.
Add a slice of toasted bread on a small plate beside the bowl.
Change the lighting to candlelit dinner ambience, warm and dim.
Add a tiny candle flame reflection on the spoon and a faint warm highlight on the cream swirl that matches the candlelight direction, while keeping the tomato soup color rich but not overly bright.

original_t2i_prompt: A high-detail 3D render of a sleek desk setup: monitor, keyboard, mouse, and a desk mat on a wooden desk, soft studio lighting, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the wooden desk surface from warm oak to cool dark walnut while preserving grain realism.
Add a ceramic cup with a pencil inside to the left of the keyboard.
Turn on the monitor to show a simple abstract wallpaper (no text, no logos).

original_t2i_prompt: A realistic photo of a snow-covered street in a small town: parked cars, street lamps, and a storefront, overcast winter light, 1024x1024 resolution

original_t2i_prompt: A photorealistic indoor scene of a wooden dresser with a round mirror, a small jewelry dish, and a perfume bottle, soft daylight, 1024x1024 resolution

edit_steps.instruction: Change the daylight to warm bedside lamp light, keeping the dresser and objects.

original_t2i_prompt: A high-detail 3D render of a futuristic hallway with glossy floor, clean white walls, and ceiling strip lights, 1024x1024 resolution

Add a floating holographic signage panel mid-hall (no readable text, abstract icons only).

original_t2i_prompt: A realistic photo of a wooden workbench with tools: a hammer, nails, measuring tape, and a piece of sanded wood, workshop lighting, 1024x1024 resolution

original_t2i_prompt: A realistic photo of a bicycle parked against a white wall, midday sun, sharp shadows, 1024x1024 resolution

original_t2i_prompt: A photorealistic close-up of a hand holding a bouquet of tulips, outdoor daylight, blurred background, 1024x1024 resolution
